prerequisites: An active Braze account with access to the Braze dashboard.
Permission in Braze to create REST API keys (access to Settings > APIs and Identifiers).
Your instance-specific REST endpoint URL (the url config field), for example https://rest.iad-01.braze.com for US-01 or https://rest.fra-01.braze.eu for EU-01.
A start_date marking the earliest point from which to sync data.

authMethods.name: REST API key (Bearer token)
authMethods.summary: The connector authenticates with a single Braze REST API key, supplied via the api_key secret field. Braze passes the key as a bearer token in the Authorization header (Authorization: Bearer YOUR_REST_API_KEY). Create the key in the dashboard under Settings > APIs and Identifiers and scope it with only the permissions the sync requires (for example user export and campaign/Canvas analytics export). Braze returns 401 for an invalid key and 403 when the key lacks the required endpoint permissions.

setupSteps.title: Create a REST API key in Braze
setupSteps.body: In the Braze dashboard, go to Settings > APIs and Identifiers and select Create API Key. Give the key a descriptive name, optionally set allowlisted IP addresses, and assign only the permissions the connector needs (such as the user export and campaign/Canvas analytics export scopes). Note that after creation the permission scope and allowlisted IPs cannot be edited; you must create a new key to change them. Copy the generated key into the api_key field.

setupSteps.title: Identify your REST endpoint URL
setupSteps.body: Determine which Braze instance you are provisioned to and use its matching REST endpoint. On the same Settings > APIs and Identifiers > API Keys tab, Braze displays the REST endpoint for your account. Examples: https://rest.iad-01.braze.com (US-01), https://rest.us-10.braze.com (US-10), https://rest.fra-01.braze.eu (EU-01). Enter this value in the url field.

setupSteps.title: Set the sync start date
setupSteps.body: Provide the start_date config field to define the earliest date from which the connector should pull data. Records before this date are not synced.
